- [Vid2Avatar: 3D Avatar Reconstruction from Videos in the Wild via Self-supervised Scene Decomposition (other)](https://moygcc.github.io/vid2avatar/)
- This text describes a system for reconstructing 3D avatars from videos in uncontrolled settings, i.e. "in the wild." The system is Self-supervised, meaning that it does not require labeled data, and uses scene decomposition to break the video down into manageable chunks. The objective is to create a realistic, life-like avatar that can be used for a variety of purposes.Category: machine learning
